_comment: Placeholder job data. Same shape as GET /api/careers/jobs (jobs[]). The careers page uses this until window.GOSLING_CAREERS_API is set, then it fetches live from PostgreSQL via the server. Edit/seed real roles through the admin backend (see docs/careers-system.md).

jobs.title: Founding iOS Engineer
jobs.summary: Own the Go!Gosling iPhone app end to end — SwiftUI, on-device AI, and an agent that turns intent into action.
jobs.descriptionMd: We're a small Ontario team building a private, on-device life assistant for iPhone. You'll shape the app's architecture and the on-device agent experience from the ground up.
responsibilities: Build core SwiftUI surfaces (Chat, Health, Maps) and the on-device agent loop
Integrate Apple Foundation Models, HealthKit, MapKit, and App Intents
Keep everything fast, private, and Allow-Once safe — no data leaves the device unless the user says so
Help define our testing bar and ship to the App Store
requirements: 3+ years shipping production iOS apps in Swift
Deep SwiftUI and Swift concurrency experience
Care about privacy, performance, and craft
Comfortable owning ambiguity at an early-stage startup
niceToHave: On-device ML / Core ML / Apple Foundation Models
HealthKit, MapKit, or App Intents experience
Open-source or indie app track record

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (NestJS · PostgreSQL)
jobs.summary: Build the privacy-first server: APIs, membership, metered AI, and the data layer — never touching users' on-device health data.
jobs.descriptionMd: Design and run the server that powers membership, model access, and local-life results — with a hard boundary that health data stays on the device.
responsibilities: Build NestJS services and a clean PostgreSQL data layer
Design APIs the iOS app and careers/admin tools consume
Own auth, rate limiting, observability, and cost-aware AI routing
Uphold the privacy contract: no health data on the server, ever
requirements: 3+ years backend (Node/TypeScript); NestJS a strong plus

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.summary: Shape Gosli and a calm, trustworthy assistant experience — from the design system to the smallest delightful state.
jobs.descriptionMd: Own product design across the app and brand. You'll evolve our design system and make a powerful agent feel warm, calm, and safe.
responsibilities: Design end-to-end flows for Chat, Health, and Maps
Grow the design-system and the Gosli character system
Prototype interactions and on-device agent states
Partner closely with engineering on a high craft bar
requirements: 4+ years product design for consumer mobile (iOS)
Strong systems thinking and a polished portfolio

jobs.title: Founding Growth & Community
jobs.summary: Take Go!Gosling to launch and beyond — story, waitlist, community, and our first thousand true fans.
jobs.descriptionMd: Lead go-to-market for launch: positioning, the launch waitlist, content, and community across Canada and beyond.
responsibilities: Own pre-launch waitlist growth and launch-day momentum
Craft story and content that respects our privacy-first values
Build community and gather product feedback
Measure what matters without compromising user privacy
requirements: Excited by an early-stage AI startup
